generalPrinciples.description: Core rules governing all API responses.

principles.name: Response Wrapper
principles.details: All API responses, without exception, will be wrapped in the 'ResultVO<T>' object, providing a consistent structure with 'code', 'message', and 'data' fields.

principles.name: Pagination Wrapper
principles.details: For endpoints returning lists, the 'data' field within 'ResultVO' will be a 'PageResult<T>' object, providing standardized pagination details ('records', 'total', 'pageNum', 'pageSize', etc.).

principles.name: Field Exclusion Policy
principles.details: Sensitive or internal fields are never exposed. This includes all '*DeletedAt' fields, 'uaPassword', internal system identifiers like 'rcVectorId', and raw JSON configuration strings unless explicitly required and structured.

viewObjects.name: UserVO
viewObjects.description: Provides essential, non-sensitive information about a user. Used for displaying the current logged-in user's profile or an author's details.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique user identifier, from uaId.

fields.name: username
fields.description: User's public username, from uaUsername.

fields.name: email
fields.description: User's email address, from uaEmail.

fields.name: phone
fields.description: User's phone number, from uaPhone.

fields.name: inviteCode
fields.description: User's unique invitation code, from uaInviteCode.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The timestamp when the user account was created, from uaCreatedAt.

modules.name: Learning Space Management
modules.description: A Learning Space is the primary container for a user's content, acting as a workspace.

viewObjects.name: LearningSpaceSimpleVO
viewObjects.description: A lightweight object for displaying a list of learning spaces, e.g., on a dashboard.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique learning space identifier, from lsId.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Name of the learning space, from lsName.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A brief description of the space, from lsDescription.

fields.name: coverImageUrl
fields.description: URL for the space's cover image, from lsCoverImageUrl.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the last update, from lsUpdatedAt.

viewObjects.name: LearningSpaceDetailVO
viewObjects.description: Provides the full details of a single learning space.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique learning space identifier, from lsId.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Name of the learning space, from lsName.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A brief description of the space, from lsDescription.

fields.name: coverImageUrl
fields.description: URL for the space's cover image, from lsCoverImageUrl.

fields.name: spacePrompt
fields.description: Global AI reference prompt for this space, from lsSpacePrompt.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp of creation, from lsCreatedAt.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the last update, from lsUpdatedAt.

modules.name: Resource Management
modules.description: Handles user-uploaded source materials like PDFs, documents, etc.

viewObjects.name: ResourceSimpleVO
viewObjects.description: A lightweight object for listing resources within a learning space.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique resource identifier, from rsId.

fields.name: title
fields.description: The title of the resource, from rsTitle.

fields.name: sourceType
fields.description: The origin type of the resource, from rsSourceType.

fields.name: status
fields.description: The current processing status of the resource, from rsStatus.
fields.notes: Enum Mapping: 0 = PENDING_PARSE, 1 = PARSING, 2 = PARSE_COMPLETED, 3 = PARSE_FAILED

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp of creation, from rsCreatedAt.

viewObjects.name: ResourceDetailVO
viewObjects.description: Provides full details about a single resource, including error information if parsing failed.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique resource identifier, from rsId.

fields.name: title
fields.description: The title of the resource, from rsTitle.

fields.name: description
fields.description: AI-searchable description, from rsDescription.

fields.name: sourceType
fields.description: The origin type of the resource, from rsSourceType.

fields.name: sourceUri
fields.description: The source URI (file path, URL, etc.), from rsSourceUri.

fields.name: prompt
fields.description: AI-searchable prompt, from rsPrompt.

fields.name: status
fields.description: The current processing status, from rsStatus.
fields.notes: Enum Mapping: 0 = PENDING_PARSE, 1 = PARSING, 2 = PARSE_COMPLETED, 3 = PARSE_FAILED

fields.name: parseErrorMessage
fields.description: Error message if parsing failed, from rsParseErrorMessage.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp of creation, from rsCreatedAt.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the last update, from rsUpdatedAt.

modules.name: Knowledge Base
modules.description: The core module for user-managed, structured knowledge.

viewObjects.name: KnowledgeFolderVO
viewObjects.description: Represents a folder in the knowledge base tree structure.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique folder identifier, from kfId.

fields.name: parentId
fields.description: Identifier of the parent folder, from kfParentId.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Name of the folder, from kfName.

fields.name: level
fields.description: The nesting level of the folder (0-5), from kfLevel.

viewObjects.name: KnowledgePointSummaryVO
viewObjects.description: A summary view of a knowledge point for display in lists or trees. It combines the main point with its current active version to get the title.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique knowledge point identifier, from kp.kpId.

fields.name: folderId
fields.description: The folder this point belongs to, from kp.kpFolderId.

fields.name: title
fields.description: The title of the current version of the knowledge point, from kpv.kpvTitle.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the last update to the point, from kp.kpUpdatedAt.

viewObjects.name: KnowledgePointDetailVO
viewObjects.description: The complete view of a single knowledge point, showing all content from its current version.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique knowledge point identifier, from kp.kpId.

fields.name: folderId
fields.description: The folder this point belongs to, from kp.kpFolderId.

fields.name: versionId
fields.description: The ID of the currently active version, from kp.kpCurrentVersionId.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Title of the content, from kpv.kpvTitle.

fields.name: definition
fields.description: The definition of the knowledge point, from kpv.kpvDefinition.

fields.name: explanation
fields.description: The detailed explanation, from kpv.kpvExplanation.

fields.name: formulaOrCode
fields.description: A code snippet or formula, from kpv.kpvFormulaOrCode.

fields.name: example
fields.description: A practical example, from kpv.kpvExample.

fields.name: difficulty
fields.description: The difficulty rating, from kpv.kpvDifficulty.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when this version was created, from kpv.kpvCreatedAt.

modules.name: Explanation Document (AI-Generated Content)
modules.description: Handles the structured documents generated by the AI.

viewObjects.name: ExplanationDocumentSummaryVO
viewObjects.description: A lightweight object for listing all generated documents.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique document identifier, from edId.

fields.name: title
fields.description: The title of the document, from edTitle.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A brief description of the document, from edDescription.

fields.name: status
fields.description: The current status of the document, from edStatus.
fields.notes: Enum Mapping: 0 = DRAFT, 1 = AI_GENERATING, 2 = NORMAL, 3 = AI_GENERATE_FAILED

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the last update, from edUpdatedAt.

viewObjects.name: ExplanationDocumentDetailVO
viewObjects.description: The main, comprehensive VO for displaying a full explanation document. This is a complex, nested object assembled by the backend service.
viewObjects.joinConditions: Backend service will fetch all components where the foreign key matches the document ID (e.g., esExplanationDocumentId = edId) and assemble the nested structure.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Document identifier, from edId.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Document title, from edTitle.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Document description, from edDescription.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Document status, from edStatus.
fields.notes: Enum Mapping: 0 = DRAFT, 1 = AI_GENERATING, 2 = NORMAL, 3 = AI_GENERATE_FAILED

fields.name: sectionOrder
fields.description: Ordered list of section IDs, from edSectionOrder.

fields.name: sections
fields.description: A list of all sections in the document.

fields.name: points
fields.description: A list of all knowledge points defined in the document.

fields.name: relations
fields.description: A list of all relations between knowledge points.

viewObjects.name: ExplanationSectionVO
viewObjects.description: Nested VO for a Section within a document.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Section identifier, from esId.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Section title, from esTitle.

fields.name: content
fields.description: Section content (Markdown), from esContent.

fields.name: subsections
fields.description: A list of all subsections within this section, ordered by the backend.

viewObjects.name: ExplanationSubsectionVO
viewObjects.description: Nested VO for a Subsection within a section.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Subsection identifier, from essId.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Subsection title, from essTitle.

fields.name: content
fields.description: Subsection content (Markdown), from essContent.

viewObjects.name: ExplanationPointVO
viewObjects.description: Nested VO for a Knowledge Point within the explanation document's context.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Point identifier, from epId.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Point title, from epTitle.

fields.name: definition
fields.description: Point definition, from epDefinition.

fields.name: explanation
fields.description: Point explanation, from epExplanation.

fields.name: formulaOrCode
fields.description: Formula or code snippet, from epFormulaOrCode.

fields.name: example
fields.description: A practical example, from epExample.

fields.name: styleConfig
fields.description: JSON string for graph node rendering, from epStyleConfig.

viewObjects.name: ExplanationRelationVO
viewObjects.description: Nested VO for a Relation between points in the document's context.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Relation identifier, from erId.

fields.name: sourcePointId
fields.description: ID of the source point, from erSourcePointId.

fields.name: targetPointId
fields.description: ID of the target point, from erTargetPointId.

fields.name: relationType
fields.description: Type of the relation (e.g., 'prerequisite'), from erRelationType.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Description of the relation, from erDescription.

fields.name: styleConfig
fields.description: JSON string for graph edge rendering, from erStyleConfig.

modules.name: Asynchronous Task Tracking
modules.description: Provides frontend visibility into the status of long-running backend jobs.

viewObjects.name: AsyncTaskVO
viewObjects.description: A simple object to show the status and result of a background task.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique task identifier, from atId.

fields.name: taskType
fields.description: The type of the task being executed, from atTaskType.

fields.name: status
fields.description: The current status of the task, from atStatus.
fields.notes: Enum Mapping from TaskStatusEnum: 0 = PENDING, 1 = RUNNING, 2 = SUCCEEDED, 3 = FAILED, 4 = CANCELED

fields.name: userFriendlyMessage
fields.description: A message suitable for display to the user, from atUserFriendlyMessage.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the task was created, from atCreatedAt.

fields.name: startedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the task started execution, from atStartedAt.

fields.name: finishedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the task completed, from atFinishedAt.
